calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Judgment By Default
Off Calendar Oct-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Aseptic Technology LLC and Joshua Cua.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Catherine Ann Robertson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Felixible Funding Ltd., Liability Co.
Steve Capper, Managing Member for plaintiff Felixible Funding Ltd., Liability Co., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Aseptic Technology LLC or Joshua Cua.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Nonpayment of Assigned Ivoices; Account Stated and Breach of Corporate Security Agreement was filed on January 27, 2020, and personally served on defendants Aseptic Technology LLC and Joshua Cua on February 26, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on May 1, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 14, 2020.

Plaintiff Flexible Funding Ltd., Liability Co. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Accounts Receivable Financing Agreement - Undated..........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Contract Amendment dated 10/01/2018........................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: New Vision Staffing, Inc. Service Agreement dated 05/16/2017...............ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Invoice totals from 02/22/2019 - 11/15/2019 totaling $695,588.24...........ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Flexible Funding Ltd., Liability Co., and against the defaulted defendants Aseptic Technology, LLC and Joshua Cua, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $685,588.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $77,353.24.
Attorney Fees - $18,986.00.
Costs - $852.82.

Total - $782,780.21.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2020 Continued To Nov-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
